---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for RouteFlow
title: "[Feature] "
labels:
  - enhancement
assignees: []
---

## 需求背景 / Problem Statement

你遇到了什么痛点？  
What problem are you trying to solve?

## 希望的方案 / Proposed Solution

你希望 RouteFlow 如何改进？  
How would you like RouteFlow to improve?

## 使用场景 / Use Case

请描述你的网络场景，例如：

- 内网网线 + 外网 Wi-Fi
- VPN + 本地网段共存
- 多出口网络切换

Describe the real-world network scenario where this feature would help.

## 可接受的替代方案 / Alternatives Considered

你是否尝试过其他做法？  
Have you considered any alternative solutions?

## 补充信息 / Additional Context

可以补充草图、规则示例、系统限制或其他上下文。  
Add any mockups, rule examples, system constraints, or other context here.
